---
title: "Secondary Tasks Analysis"
output: html_document
author:
  - "John Kafumbe"
  - "Jeffrey Olsen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
```

## `ST_*` alignment

```{r Read in DMS data}
non_aug <- read.csv("./data/non_aug_data.csv") %>%
  # Filter out "1" rows with previous row also "1"
  filter(!((Left_Button_Press == lag(Left_Button_Press)) 
           & (Left_Button_Press == 1))
         & (Left_Button_Press != 2))
```

```{r Get ST columns}

output <- read_excel("./data/output_IIHS_withDMS.xls") %>%
  rename("ST_Right_N" = "ST_Rights_N") %>%
  select(matches("ST_(Right|Left).*") | "DaqName") %>%
  drop_na()

output$DaqName <- output$DaqName %>% str_sub(0, -5)

# Add counted hits from data set
output <- merge(output,
                rename(aggregate(Left_Button_Press ~ DaqName,
                                 data = non_aug,
                                 FUN = sum,
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
                       "Counted_Left_Button_Press" = "Left_Button_Press"),
                by = "DaqName",
                all = TRUE)
output <- merge(output,
                rename(aggregate(Right_Button_Press ~ DaqName,
                                 data = non_aug,
                                 FUN = sum,
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
                       "Counted_Right_Button_Press" = "Right_Button_Press"),
                by = "DaqName",
                all = TRUE)
```

```{r Locate button presses}
left_button_press_indices <- filter(non_aug, Left_Button_Press == 1)$X + 1
right_button_press_indices <- filter(non_aug, Right_Button_Press == 1)$X + 1
```

```{r Plot high counts to debug, fig.show="hold", out.width = "50%"}
tmp <- non_aug %>% filter(DaqName == "NADS_IMPAIR_3A_20231003130651")
ggplot(data = tmp, aes(x = X, y = Left_Button_Press)) + geom_line()
tmp <- non_aug %>% filter(DaqName == "NADS_IMPAIR_3B_RS2_20231003082622")
ggplot(data = tmp, aes(x = X, y = Left_Button_Press)) + geom_line()
```
